items.description: Elegant FAQ section with accordion-style questions, smooth transitions, and clear support call-to-action.

items.name: faqs-2
items.description: Split-screen FAQ layout with bordered sections, interactive accordion, and a clean call-to-action footer.

items.name: faqs-3
items.description: Two-column FAQ section featuring bordered layout, vertical guide line, and elegant accordion interactions.

items.name: faqs-4
items.description: Multi-category FAQ section with sidebar filters, adaptive accordion layout, and elegant interactive transitions.

items.description: Minimal feature card with icon, title, and subtle grid background.

items.name: footer-1
items.description: Clean footer with company links, resources, and social icons.

items.name: footer-2
items.description: Animated footer with link sections, brand logo, and social icons.

items.name: footer-3
items.description: Grid-based footer with social cards, link groups, and copyright bar.

items.name: footer-4
items.description: Multi-column footer with app store buttons, social icons, and link groups.

items.name: footer-5
items.description: Sticky layered footer with gradient background, social icons, and animated link groups.

items.name: form-1
items.description: Elegant workspace creation form with labeled inputs, grouped fields, and a clean card layout for onboarding users smoothly.

items.name: form-2
items.description: Project submission form featuring bordered layout, plus-icon corners, and detailed input fields for name, repository, and description.

items.name: form-3
items.description: Comprehensive account settings form with structured fields for name, email, password, and phone number, featuring icons, grouped inputs, and save actions.

items.name: header-1
items.description: Responsive sticky header with scroll blur effect, animated mobile menu, and adaptive navigation links.

items.name: header-2
items.description: Elegant responsive header with scroll-based styling, mobile drawer menu, and smooth transitions.

items.name: header-3
items.description: Feature-rich responsive header with scroll blur, animated mobile drawer, and nested navigation menus.

items.name: header-4
items.description: A sticky responsive header with logo, navigation menu, and scroll-aware animations that adapts seamlessly between mobile and desktop views.Retry

items.name: header-5
items.description: A sticky animated header with dropdown navigation menus for courses and community, featuring smooth scroll-triggered morphing between expanded and compact pill-shaped states.

items.name: header-6
items.description: A sticky header with multi-column dropdown menus for product and company navigation, featuring grid and list layouts with responsive design for mobile and desktop.

items.name: header-7
items.description: Floating squircle navigation with popover menu and social links.

items.name: header-8
items.description: Compact navigation with dropdown menus and separated action buttons.

items.name: header-9
items.description: Scroll-aware navigation with featured cards and affiliate section.

items.name: header-10
items.description: Fixed navigation with dropdown menus and mobile accordion.

items.name: header-11
items.description: Centered navigation with dropdown menus and action buttons.

items.name: header-12
items.description: Bordered navigation with GitHub stars counter and dropdown menus.

items.name: header-13
items.description: Scroll-triggered navigation with featured customer stories and open-source cards.

items.name: header-14
items.description: Sticky header with scroll-based resizing and multi-column dropdowns.

items.description: Modern hero page with particle background and social login buttons.

items.name: image-gallery-1
items.description: Masonry-style responsive gallery using random images with dynamic aspect ratios.

items.description: Simple logo grid displaying brand icons in a clean, bordered layout with light and dark mode support.

items.description: Stylish logo grid featuring top tech brands with decorative plus icons and dynamic borders for a modern visual layout.

items.description: Smooth infinite-scrolling logo showcase highlighting trusted brands with gradient masking and elegant motion effects.

items.name: logo-cloud-4
items.description: Animated logo carousel with soft edge blurs and gradient accents for a sleek, modern brand showcase.
